title: Hybrid Hypergraph + Transformer approach
author: immartian
architecture: Residual transformer with a binding-energy-weighted hypergraph pattern store

data.description: Binding-energy-weighted multi-resolution exact pattern memory combined with a residual transformer; stores bigrams, trigrams, and 5-grams as exact patterns and interpolates with neural predictions.
Two-phase training pipeline: Phase 1 scans FineWeb shards to build a multi-level pattern table using binding energy; Phase 2 trains a residual transformer.
Hybrid inference via interpolation between exact hypergraph predictions and neural predictions with confidence-based mixing coefficient lambda.

novel_contributions: Binding-energy-weighted pattern store (epistemic hypergraph) for exact multi-resolution n-gram memory
Generalization of BigramHash to a principled hierarchy of bigrams, trigrams, and 5-grams
Two-phase training pipeline with fast corpus scan followed by residual transformer training
Confidence-weighted hybrid interpolation between symbolic pattern memory and neural predictions
Automatic filtering of zero-binding/noisy patterns using binding energy criteria
